name: memoria-desktop
description: Memoria desktop wrapper — Electron shell that runs the Memoria Node server as a child process and shows its UI in a Chromium window.

scripts.predev: npm run icons && npm run build:ts
scripts.build: npm run icons && npm run build:ts && npm run bundle:server && electron-builder
scripts.build:win: npm run icons && npm run build:ts && npm run bundle:server -- --platform=win-x64 && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: npm run icons && npm run build:ts && npm run bundle:server -- --platform=darwin-arm64 && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run icons && npm run build:ts && npm run bundle:server -- --platform=linux-x64 && electron-builder --linux
